title: Sales Associate (Full Time / 5 Days Work Week)
description:
As a Sales Associate, your primary responsibility is to drive sales growth through achieving targets and delivering exceptional customer service. You will play a crucial role in enhancing the customer shopping experience by engaging with customers in a friendly and personalized manner, addressing their needs, and resolving any concerns. The retail sales associate should be passionate about people and eager to develop new customer-service skills, contributing to the overall efficiency and success of the store.


JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

1.Customer Service Excellence

•Engage customers with expertise by providing 1-to-1 personalized advice on golf equipment, accessories, apparel and services based on customers' needs and preferences

•Create a memorable shopping experience by providing exceptional level of customer service that exceeds customer expectations and always be approachable and gracious in all customer interactions

•Handle inquiries and complaints professionally and resolve customers’ concerns with patience and efficiency to ensure customer satisfaction


2.Sales Commitment

•Achieve or exceed weekly sales target, proactive in promoting products that suit customer needs and cross-selling complementary goods and services to boost sales

•Execute in store marketing and promotional displays based on company’s guidelines and support local golf sales events

•Demonstrate product knowledge and continuous learning for latest golf products, trends, and promotions to service customers’ inquiries


3.Inventory Management

•Monitor stock levels to ensure shelves are always well-stocked, tidy, and reflect accurate inventory levels to avoid customer dissatisfaction

•Conduct regular inventory checks and assist in cycle counts and annual stock takes to maintain inventory accuracy and prevent shrinkage

•Assist in coordinating with stock merchandisers and report low-stock or overstock situations to the team to support inventory management. (pending Cindy)


4.Store Operation & Safety

•Maintain store cleanliness to ensure the store is clean, organized, and presentable to reflect the brand's professionalism and attract customers

•Maintain merchandise in accordance with company’s visual merchandising guidelines. Actively participate in all merchandising activities including, but not limited to, daily stock maintenance, product transfers, and folding clothes.

•Support operational efficiency and to assist with opening and closing duties, including cash handling and securing the premises.


5.ILG Membership

•Register new members: Actively encourage customers to sign up and assist them through the registration process

•Promote ILG membership benefits: Educate customers on the advantages of ILG membership, such as exclusive discounts, events, and perks

•Build customer loyalty: Cultivate long-term relationships through personalized service and follow-ups to encourage repeat business


Experience and Skills:

• At least 1 year in a similar role within the retail industry

• Proven experience in achieving sales targets and KPIs

• Strong clients focus with an ability to build lasting relationships

• Exceptional verbal and presentation skills

• Positive, collaborative, and goal-oriented team member

• Friendly, professional demeanour with effective communication

• Ability to perform well in a fast-paced environment

• Demonstrates punctuality, honesty, and discipline

• Self-motivated, driven, and open to feedback

• Able to commit to rotating shifts (opening & closing hrs)


Benefits:

  • 5 days work week
  • OT + Performance Bonus + Commission + Incentive
  • Career Advancement
  • Health Insurance + Medical & Hospitalization Insurance + Life Insurance + Personnel Accident Insurance
  • Up to 14 days of Annual Leave
  • Sick Leave Benefits + Statutory Leave Benefits
  • Friendly Working + Teamwork Environment

*Want to know more about us? Please visit the link here: https://youtu.be/6cC0kesEVwQ

postedCompany.description:
MST Golf is the largest chain of golf specialty retailer in Malaysia and has more than 50 retail outlets in Malaysia, Singapore and Indonesia. With retail as its backbone, MST Golf’s businesses also covers wholesale business, golf related services including golf coaching, golf academies, event/tournament management, corporate merchandising, club fitting and operating driving ranges. MST Golf is the distributor and retail partner of many global golf brands.  


MST Golf also owns and operates MST Golf Arena, an indoor golf centre which merges entertainment, dining, and retail which was first introduced in 2022. The Group's unique 3-in-1 retail concept is a first-of-its-kind in Malaysia, combining the golf specialty retail store, golf academy and indoor golf facility all under one roof.


We intend to play an active role in expanding our operations, strengthening the industry, and driving the sustainability and growth of golf and its people to uphold our vision of serving our customers and members the best in everything golf.
postedCompany.name: MST GOLF (SINGAPORE) PTE LTD
